text_block_list.name: Monólogo
text_block_list.text:
I rush into the waiting room to<n>congratulate T.M.
Opera O on her<n>victory.

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
The masses applaud and rejoice. I<n>am strong, yet
elegant—unobscured<n>brilliance incarnate.

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text: I am the high, the mighty, T.M. Opera<n>O!

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
Haaah ha ha! Now sing your praises<n>of my
triumphant victory!
choice_data_list: This victory is just the beginning.

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
Heh... I graciously accept your<n>kindness. Let me
gift you a few of my<n>own...

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
Words of prophecy! After the next<n>race, your
praises shall ring once<n>again!

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
How do I know? Because both you<n>and the
natural world...

text_block_list.name: Monólogo
text_block_list.text:
Opera O is already confident she'll<n>win the next
race!

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
Just as my beauty persists endlessly<n>into the
future, this forward march will<n>not come to a halt.

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
Not until I, the Centurial Overlord, bring<n>my light of
good fortune unto the<n>entire world!

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
As such, it is only natural that you, my<n>trainer,
should comprehend the<n>philosophy of it.

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
Thus, I make this inquiry. What is it<n>we should do
next?

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
Excellent! Let us begin at once, so<n>that I may claim
a brilliance<n>unparalleled—and illuminate the
heavens themselves!

text_block_list.name: Monólogo
text_block_list.text:
The next day, in pursuit of our next<n>victory, we
train rigorously under the<n>shining sun!
